chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 114 of 2014 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4158/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.4159/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.4160/2025 (R/Surety) 28.08.2025 Applicant / Surety, Mithal Shah, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety. As per his contentions, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Bagan Shah, Koural Shah and Hashim Shah alias Najam Shah, who on 06.03.2014, were granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.08 dated 04.03.2014, issued by the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Kotdiji, had surrendered before the trial Court and have been acquitted under Section 345, Cr.P.C., as is evident from order dated 27.04.2014, annexed with this application. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
